basic_details.job_title: ESIC Laboratory Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Laboratory Technician Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website https://www.esic.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Laboratory Technician post through the ESIC Laboratory Technician Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: As per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) or BMLT with 1 year experience OR B.Sc. in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Microbiology with 1-year full-time Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT/MLT) and 1 year experience OR 12th Pass (Science) and Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT/MLT) of 2 years duration with 2 years experience.
qualification.details: Laboratory Technician: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) or BMLT from a recognized university with at least 1 year of relevant experience in a clinical/research laboratory. B.Sc. in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Microbiology (or related) with 1-year full-time Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT/MLT) and 1 year of laboratory experience. 12th Pass (Science) and Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT/MLT) of 2 years duration with 2 years of laboratory experience in a clinical or research setting. Experience must be after obtaining the minimum qualification, in recognized laboratories (clinical/research/diagnostic centers).

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 20,000/- per month + HRA as admissible
salary_details.details: Rs. 20,000/- per month + HRA as admissible

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be called for an Interview. Date
time and venue will be notified on the ESIC website and by email.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ESIC Laboratory Technician Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Laboratory Technician Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Laboratory Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Laboratory Technician Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Laboratory Technician: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) or BMLT from a recognized university with at least 1 year of relevant experience in a clinical/research laboratory. B.Sc. in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Microbiology (or related) with 1-year full-time Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT/MLT) and 1 year of laboratory experience. 12th Pass (Science) and Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT/MLT) of 2 years duration with 2 years of laboratory experience in a clinical or research setting. Experience must be after obtaining the minimum qualification, in recognized laboratories (clinical/research/diagnostic centers).

content_sections.heading: ESIC Laboratory Technician Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: As per Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Laboratory Technician Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 20,000/- per month + HRA as admissible

content_sections.heading: ESIC Laboratory Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date of Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: ESIC Laboratory Technician Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be called for an Interview. Date, time and venue will be notified on the ESIC website and by email.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ESIC Laboratory Technician Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Laboratory Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ESIC Laboratory Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ESIC Laboratory Technician position is 26th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Laboratory Technician post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Sc. in MLT or BMLT with experience, or a B.Sc. in Life Sciences with a DMLT/MLT diploma and experience, or 12th pass with a 2-year DMLT/MLT diploma and experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Laboratory Technician post is 30 years, with age relaxation applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Laboratory Technician position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as admissible.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ESIC Laboratory Technician job?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent via email to [email protected] before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Laboratory Technician post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Laboratory Technician in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Laboratory Technician role?
faq.answer: Candidates will be shortlisted and then called for an interview. The date, time, and venue will be communicated via email and on the ESIC website.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: This is a contractual recruitment for the Laboratory Technician post.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ESIC Laboratory Technician job located?
faq.answer: The job is located in Faridabad, Haryana, at the ESIC Medical College & Hospital.
